description.value:
A short-ranged multi-bolt crossbow that fires a spread of bolts in a tight pattern. At close range it is devastating, shredding through flesh and punching through light armor with every volley.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Ranged 2d4 (20/80), Piercing
BasicTwo-Handed, Ranged 3d4+3 (20/80), Reload bonus, Hipshot, Keen, Puncture
MasterTwo-Handed, Ranged 3d4+3 (20/80), Reload bonus, Hipshot, Keen, Puncture â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkThe Puncture property now activates when any individual die shows a 3 or 4, in addition to its normal triggers.

rmeData.masterPerk: The Puncture property now activates when any individual die shows a 3 or 4, in addition to its normal triggers.
